sharingCriteriaRules.description: Sharing Leads via Territory field to enable switching territory for lead
sharingCriteriaRules.label: Share Leads for French Sales Team

sharingCriteriaRules.description: Sharing Leads via Territory field to enable switching territory for lead
sharingCriteriaRules.label: Share Leads for Spanish Sales Team

sharingOwnerRules.description: Allows the French Sales team to view leads from other Sales Represenatives within the FR Sales Representaitve Roles
sharingOwnerRules.label: Share Leads for French Sales Team

sharingOwnerRules.description: Allows the Spanish Sales team to view leads from other Sales Represenatives within the ES Sales Representaitve Roles
sharingOwnerRules.label: Share Leads for Spanish Sales Team
